projectId.description: Stable program-index project id, for example attune-nx.

sourceRoot.description: Project root recorded in artifact provenance, for example packages/attune-nx.

directory.description: Source directory where attune.package.ts files should be written. Defaults to <sourceRoot>/src when sourceRoot is provided, otherwise src.

owningProject.description: Owning Nx project id for generated artifact provenance.

symbolId.description: Optional seed symbol id. Defaults to <projectId>-boundary.

symbolName.description: Optional human-readable symbol name used for generated schema identifiers.

generatorVersion.description: Generator version recorded in artifact provenance.

generatorRevision.description: Generator revision recorded in artifact provenance.

openspecChangeId.description: OpenSpec change id recorded in artifact provenance.
